scripts.build: npm run services:generate && npm run web:build && npm run services:build
scripts.typecheck: npm run services:generate && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.services.json --noEmit && npm --workspace @tikto/web run typecheck
scripts.prisma:format: prisma format --schema services/profile/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma format --schema services/tasks/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma format --schema services/calendar/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.services:generate: prisma generate --schema services/profile/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema services/tasks/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema services/calendar/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.services:build: npm run services:generate && tsc -p tsconfig.services.json && npm run services:copy-prisma
scripts.service:profile:build: prisma generate --schema services/profile/prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p services/profile/tsconfig.json && node tooling/scripts/copy-service-prisma-client.mjs profile
scripts.service:tasks:build: prisma generate --schema services/tasks/prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p services/tasks/tsconfig.json && node tooling/scripts/copy-service-prisma-client.mjs tasks
scripts.service:calendar:build: prisma generate --schema services/calendar/prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p services/calendar/tsconfig.json && node tooling/scripts/copy-service-prisma-client.mjs calendar
